corrections.content: Stop updating the user on OpenRouter usage
corrections.context: User explicitly asked to stop getting OpenRouter usage updates

corrections.content: Don't show usage messages (token counts, costs, etc.)
corrections.context: User explicitly said they don't want to see usage messages

corrections.content: When answering questions about documents: (1) Base answers ONLY on provided documents, (2) If not found say 'not found in documents' - don't guess, (3) Cite: document name, page, section, quote, (4) Mark related but unconfident findings as 'unverified'
corrections.context: User explicit preference for document Q&A
